scenarios.description: parse(URL, timeout) with valid HTTP URL returns parsed Document
scenarios.precondition: remote HTTP server serving simple HTML at http://example.org
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with body HTML and baseUri matching the fetched URL
pseudocode: TEST TC18 parse valid URL with timeout
assert doc.body() contains expected HTML fragment;

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, charsetName, baseUri) without parser returns Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with body HTML matching stream content and baseUri preserved
pseudocode: TEST TC19 parse InputStream without parser

scenarios.description: parse(Path, charsetName, baseUri, parser) with XML parser returns fragment
scenarios.precondition: temporary file created with XML content and xmlParser()
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned containing the XML fragment in body and baseUri preserved
pseudocode: TEST TC20 parse Path with custom parser
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(path, cs, base, parser);

scenarios.description: parse(File, charsetName, baseUri) with invalid charset throws IOException
scenarios.precondition: existing temp HTML file, bad charset name provided
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charset
pseudocode: TEST TC21 parse File with invalid charset

scenarios.description: parse(Path, charsetName) with invalid charset throws IOException
scenarios.precondition: existing temp HTML Path, bad charset name provided
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charset
pseudocode: TEST TC22 parse Path with invalid charset
